personal-dashboard-risky-article-edits-s: Ka caawi ilaalinta kalsoonida Wikipedia adigoo dib u eegaya isbeddellada soo socda ee u baahan feejignaan.
Wax ka beddelladan waxaa sameeyey isticmaaleyaal kale. La soco wixii cusub, kana qayb qaado caawinta tayada Wikipedia adigoo dib u eegaya.

[$1 aalad otomaatig ah oo ka hortagta kharribaadda] waxay calaamadisaa isbeddello halis u muuqda oo ay sameeyeen tifaftirayaal kale. Dooro mid si aad u furto aragtida isbeddelka oo aad go'aansato inaad ka noqoto, hagaajiso, ama u mahadceliso tifaftiraha.
personal-dashboard-risky-article-edits-f: Eeg isbeddello dheeraad ah bogga [{{fullurl:Special:RecentChanges|revertrisklanguageagnostic=all}} isbeddellada ugu dambeeyay]
personal-dashboard-risky-article-edits-l: Ma jiro koobitaanka wax ka beddelka
personal-dashboard-risky-article-edits-p: bar horumar oo dhexda ku jirta oo muujisa marka isbeddellada dib u eegista lagu soo shubo
